_comment: Hand-curated overrides for files that don't have <meta name='category'> tags of their own. Keys are filenames. Any field you set here wins over the file's own meta tags.

Israel_Book_Easy.html.title: The Story of Israel
Israel_Book_Easy.html.description: A plain-English history of Israel in 15 short chapters — from ancient times through October 7, 2023.
